title: Junior Business Development Manager at CBRE India

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at CBRE India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? CBRE India in Gurgaon offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CBRE India:
CBRE India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CBRE India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
